diff: The process begins when a stakeholder's needs require an item that Core GovOps believes is novel in an upcoming Spell. Core GovOps submits a request to the Core Facilitator for inclusion of the item. The Core Facilitator also has the authority to independently request inclusion of a novel item.
summary: Add Process For Novel Spell Items
description: Adds a definition and process for assessing and including novel Spell items in Executive Votes.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
